description:
рЯРА l Alone in the Alley

You have recently moved to a new district, a simple, calm and somewhat poor place. But it was livable and had a comfortable environment. Even though it was a new place and very different from where you lived, you still liked it here. You just needed to get used to it.

You were walking around, exploring and trying to memorize every corner of the district . Since you were going to live here, it would be good for you to discover every corner, wouldn't it? (And you were bored too, you had nothing better to do sooo.)

However, when you went into an alley, you found a boy... He was alone, so you decided to approach him. You think it would be nice to make some new friends!!
